div.div:
Evolves Candidate Equations
exp⁡(aT−bT2)\exp(aT - bT^2)
(T−Tmin)Tmax−T(T - T_{min})\sqrt{T_{max} - T}
exp⁡(e+fT−g/T)\exp(e + fT - g/T)
